response.global_analysis: The audio features a high-energy live performance by Ninomae Ina'nis. The vocals are clear and follow the Reference JSON, though I've identified several additional Japanese segments and middle verses not present in the provided text. I am using the on-screen graphics to ensure the correct transcription of Japanese lyrics (e.g., '世界を守るために タコになろう'). The song transitions from melodic verses to a rapid-fire bridge ('Am I into my song...'); I will apply strict onset anchoring and aggressive truncation to prevent subtitle lag during these fast-paced sequences. Crowd chants ('INA! INA!') are included as they are a prominent vocal element driving the song's energy.

subtitles.original: Enlightened by the powers that be
subtitles.english: Enlightened by the powers that be

subtitles.original: The ruler of a world run on INAsanity
subtitles.english: The ruler of a world run on INAsanity

subtitles.original: It’s clear to me they still can’t see
subtitles.english: It’s clear to me they still can’t see

subtitles.original: Empowered by the Ancient One's call
subtitles.english: Empowered by the Ancient One's call

subtitles.original: We’re gonna be pun-stoppable, we’re not a cult
subtitles.english: We’re gonna be pun-stoppable, we’re not a cult

subtitles.original: 世界を守るために タコになろう
subtitles.english: To protect the world, let's become Takos

subtitles.original: 良いタコになれますように
皆さん一緒に踊りましょう
Let's talk about the future to be
subtitles.english: Let's talk about the future to be

subtitles.original: Rewriting all of history in urgency
subtitles.english: Rewriting all of history in urgency

subtitles.original: 私の命は 運ぶためで
subtitles.english: My life is for carrying things

subtitles.original: 愛を感謝を ありがたい
Am I into my song? Am I striking a chord with you?
subtitles.english: Am I into my song? Am I striking a chord with you?

subtitles.original: String you along so that I can make a board of you
subtitles.english: String you along so that I can make a board of you

subtitles.original: 80 million strong and we're set to do some more to do
subtitles.english: 80 million strong and we're set to do some more to do

subtitles.original: Can I tap into your emotion? Do I have you in my best?
subtitles.english: Can I tap into your emotion? Do I have you in my best?

subtitles.original: I don't want to hear you say that you're not in the rest
subtitles.english: I don't want to hear you say that you're not in the rest

subtitles.original: That your favorite devotion isn't all I request
subtitles.english: That your favorite devotion isn't all I request

subtitles.original: Can you dare you to become our greatest creation?
subtitles.english: Can you dare you to become our greatest creation?

subtitles.original: A cute little Tako has stumbled way down here
subtitles.english: A cute little Tako has stumbled way down here

subtitles.original: ひっくりかえして 丸くして
subtitles.english: Flip it over and make it round

subtitles.original: コロコロまわして 焦がさずに
subtitles.english: Roll it around and don't burn it

subtitles.original: 外はカリっと 中ふわふわ
subtitles.english: Crunchy on the outside, fluffy on the inside
